madeToday.title: Made today, shipped tomorrow
madeToday.text: Once your design is approved, we’ll start production right away. Most orders arrive in 1–2 days.

proofReview.title: Online Proof Review
proofReview.text: Receive your proof right after payment. Make revisions anytime until you approve.

durability.title: Outstanding durability and water resistance
durability.text: Made from thick, premium material. Long-lasting color and adhesive strength.
